entities.name: 公益公司 (Public Benefit Corporation)

entities.name: 金融重力 (financial gravity)

entities.name: 文化银行 (culture bank)
entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:一种将「可信赖度」视为资产的管理实践。每次为了价值观牺牲时就是在存款，为了私利走捷径就是取款。核心规则是「只做存款，绝不做取款」。

evidence.quote: But the second thing that I think is less appreciated is a practice I call the culture bank, which is when you start to see trustworthiness as an asset, you start to realize that certain actions build that asset and others take it away.

entities.how_described: 本集把它说成:管理先驱 Mary Parker Follett 提出的概念，指那个当管理者不在场时，依然能指引成千上万个微小决策的「共同目标」。只有使命内化，组织才真正不可摧毁。
